nestedItems.name: Hex Head Screws
nestedItems.description: Features a heavy-duty six-sided head designed for high-torque tightening with standard wrenches or sockets. These are ideal for structural applications requiring robust fastening.

nestedItems.name: Rounded Head Screws
nestedItems.description: Provides a smooth, finished look with a low-profile head that helps prevent snagging on moving parts. They are commonly used in machinery guards and consumer electronics.

nestedItems.name: Tapping Screws
nestedItems.description: Equipped with sharp threads and a pointed tip that creates its own mating threads in metal or plastic. This eliminates the need for pre-drilling in many thin-gauge materials.

nestedItems.name: Drywall Screws
nestedItems.description: Specially coated and bugle-headed for attaching gypsum board to wood or metal studs without tearing the surface. The phosphate coating provides excellent base adhesion for joint compound.

nestedItems.name: Threaded Rods
nestedItems.description: Continuous threaded lengths designed for general-purpose hanging, mounting, and structural bracing. They can be easily cut to custom lengths using a hacksaw or abrasive saw.

nestedItems.name: Threaded Rods with Hex Nuts
nestedItems.description: Complete assembly kits used for heavy-duty anchoring and clamping where nuts are required on both ends. This set ensures compatibility between the rod and the fastening hardware.

nestedItems.name: Left Handed Threaded Rods
nestedItems.description: Threaded in the opposite direction to prevent loosening from rotational vibrations in machinery. These are essential for rotating shafts that turn in a clockwise direction.

nestedItems.name: Threaded Rod Assortments
nestedItems.description: A collection of various lengths and diameters, ideal for maintenance shops and prototyping needs. The organized storage case helps keep different sizes separated and easy to find.

nestedItems.name: Screw Eyes
nestedItems.description: Light-duty fasteners with a closed loop for attaching cables, wires, or hooks to wood surfaces. They are frequently used for hanging lightweight signage or organizing workshop tools.

nestedItems.name: Unthreaded Eyebolts
nestedItems.description: Used for permanent attachment via welding or pinning, often found in heavy lifting and rigging. The lack of threads allows for a more secure, integrated bond with the base structure.

nestedItems.name: Eyebolts
nestedItems.description: Standard lifting bolts with a fully threaded shank for securing heavy equipment to hoisting lines. Always ensure the load is aligned with the plane of the eye for maximum safety.

nestedItems.name: Eyenuts
nestedItems.description: Female-threaded loops that screw onto existing threaded rods or bolts for overhead lifting points. These provide a versatile solution for adding attachment points to pre-installed studs.

nestedItems.name: U Bolts
nestedItems.description: Round-bend bolts designed to secure piping or conduit to structural steel and round surfaces. They are widely used in automotive exhaust systems and plumbing installations.

nestedItems.name: Square U Bolts
nestedItems.description: Feature a flat base to secure square-shaped tubes or beams to mounting plates. This design prevents the bolt from rotating during tightening against flat surfaces.

nestedItems.name: Rubber Cushioned U Bolts
nestedItems.description: Includes a vibration-dampening lining to protect delicate piping and reduce system noise. The cushion also prevents metal-to-metal contact that can lead to galvanic corrosion.

nestedItems.name: NonConductive U Bolts
nestedItems.description: Made from glass-filled nylon or composites for use in electrical and chemical environments. These are ideal for supporting cables in corrosive or high-voltage areas.

nestedItems.name: U Bolt Plates
nestedItems.description: Reinforcement plates that distribute pressure across the surface being clamped by a U-bolt. Using these plates prevents the bolt from digging into or deforming the material being secured.

nestedItems.name: Nuts
nestedItems.description: General-purpose hexagonal fasteners used with bolts and rods to create high-strength mechanical joints. They are available in various grades and finishes to match the strength of the mating bolt.

nestedItems.name: Washers
nestedItems.description: Flat spacing discs that distribute the load of a fastener to prevent surface damage and loosening. They also help to bridge oversized holes in thin materials.

nestedItems.name: Plastic Washers
nestedItems.description: Non-marring, corrosion-resistant washers ideal for sealing and electrical insulation. These are perfect for use with delicate surfaces like glass or painted panels.

nestedItems.name: Square Washers
nestedItems.description: Larger surface area washers used in timber construction to provide maximum load distribution. Their shape provides a greater bearing surface than standard round washers.

nestedItems.name: Adhesives
nestedItems.description: Industrial bonding agents designed for high-strength permanent assembly of metal, plastic, and glass. These formulas are engineered to withstand extreme temperatures and chemical exposure.

nestedItems.name: Glue Gun
nestedItems.description: Professional-grade heating tool for precision application of hot-melt adhesive sticks. It features an ergonomic trigger and a fast heat-up time for efficient workflow.

nestedItems.name: Instant Bond Adhesives
nestedItems.description: Cyanoacrylate formulas that cure in seconds for rapid repair and small-scale assembly. They provide a strong bond on non-porous surfaces with very little clamping time required.

nestedItems.name: Glue Gun Nozzle
nestedItems.description: Precision tips and replacement nozzles for controlling the flow and spread of hot adhesives. Different shapes allow for bead application, wide spreading, or reaching into tight crevices.

nestedItems.name: Mounting Tape
nestedItems.description: Double-sided, high-bond tape used for hanging signs and equipment without drilling holes. It conforms to irregular surfaces and provides a permanent, weather-resistant bond.

nestedItems.name: Electrical Tape
nestedItems.description: Pressure-sensitive vinyl tape used for insulating wires and shielding electrical connections. It is highly flexible and resistant to moisture, abrasion, and varying weather conditions.

nestedItems.name: Duct Tape
nestedItems.description: Heavy-duty cloth-backed tape with extreme adhesive strength for sealing and emergency repairs. Its versatile nature makes it a staple for both industrial maintenance and household fixes.

nestedItems.name: Marking Tape
nestedItems.description: High-visibility vinyl tape for designating floor hazards, aisles, and safety zones. The durable material resists scuffing from foot traffic and heavy warehouse machinery.

nestedItems.name: Bulbs
nestedItems.description: A wide variety of LED, halogen, and incandescent lamps for industrial and warehouse lighting. These bulbs are selected for their durability and consistent light output in demanding environments.

nestedItems.name: Bi Pin Base Floodlight Bulbs
nestedItems.description: High-intensity bi-pin base bulbs for outdoor and industrial lighting applications. They provide a focused beam of light suitable for security and large-area illumination.

nestedItems.name: Miniature LED Bulbs
nestedItems.description: Energy-efficient LED bulbs with long lifespans, ideal for commercial and residential use. Their small form factor makes them perfect for indicator lights and accent fixtures.

nestedItems.name: Coloured Screw-in Bulbs
nestedItems.description: Coloured screw-in bulbs for decorative and functional lighting applications. Use them to create specific moods or to signal different operational statuses in a facility.

nestedItems.name: Screw-in Bulbs
nestedItems.description: Standard screw-in bulbs for general lighting applications in residential and commercial settings. They are compatible with most standard sockets for easy replacement and maintenance.

nestedItems.name: Batteries
nestedItems.description: Standard and specialized power cells, from alkaline AA to high-output lithium for portable tools. These batteries are designed to provide reliable, long-lasting energy for critical devices.

nestedItems.name: Grounding Wire
nestedItems.description: Bare copper and insulated wires designed to provide a safe discharge path for electrical surges. Proper grounding is essential for protecting both personnel and sensitive electronic equipment.

nestedItems.name: Power Cables
nestedItems.description: Multicore, heavy-gauge cables for delivering primary power to machinery and electrical panels. They are rated for high voltage and current to ensure safe power distribution.

nestedItems.name: Cable Ties
nestedItems.description: Self-locking nylon fasteners for organizing and securing wire bundles and cable runs. Their high tensile strength ensures that cables remain neatly bundled even under mechanical stress.

nestedItems.name: Cable and Wire Crimpers
nestedItems.description: Ratcheting hand tools designed to compress terminals onto wires for air-tight electrical connections. The built-in mechanism ensures a consistent, high-quality crimp every time.

nestedItems.name: Wire Cutters
nestedItems.description: Hardened steel cutting edges for clean, shear-style trimming of various wire gauges. The insulated handles provide a comfortable grip and protection during electrical work.

nestedItems.name: Wire Sleeving
nestedItems.description: Expandable protective mesh used to shield cables from abrasion and mechanical wear. It also helps in organizing multiple wires into a single, manageable bundle.

nestedItems.name: Pipes
nestedItems.description: Rigid structural and fluid-handling pipes available in steel, PVC, and copper alloys. These pipes are manufactured to meet strict industry standards for pressure and durability.

nestedItems.name: Chimney Pipes
nestedItems.description: Double-walled insulated venting for safe exhaust of high-temperature furnace gases. The insulation helps maintain draft and prevents the outer surface from becoming a fire hazard.

nestedItems.name: CPVC Pipes for Hot Water
nestedItems.description: Thermoplastic piping designed for residential and industrial hot-water distribution systems. It offers superior resistance to heat and common plumbing chemicals compared to standard PVC.

nestedItems.name: Fiberglass Pipes
nestedItems.description: Corrosion-proof, lightweight piping suitable for seawater and aggressive chemical transport. Its high strength-to-weight ratio makes it an excellent choice for offshore and industrial applications.

nestedItems.name: Routing Pipe Clamps
nestedItems.description: Structural hangers used to support and align pipe runs along walls or ceilings. They allow for thermal expansion and contraction while keeping the piping system securely in place.

nestedItems.name: Hose
nestedItems.description: Flexible fluid lines for air, water, and hydraulic oil, reinforced for pressure resistance. The outer cover is designed to resist ozone, weather, and abrasion in harsh environments.

nestedItems.name: Hose Fittings
nestedItems.description: Barbed and threaded connectors for secure attachment of hoses to pumps and tools. These fittings are precision-machined to prevent leaks and ensure a reliable connection under pressure.

nestedItems.name: Pipe Wrenches
nestedItems.description: Heavy-duty adjustable wrenches with serrated jaws for gripping and turning round pipes. The self-locking design provides a powerful grip that increases as more torque is applied.

nestedItems.name: Valves
nestedItems.description: Precision flow-control devices, including ball and gate valves, for regulating fluid systems. They are available in various materials to ensure compatibility with different liquids and gases.

nestedItems.name: Drum Faucets
nestedItems.description: Heavy-duty dispensing taps for horizontal storage drums and chemical containers. The large handle provides easy operation even when wearing thick industrial gloves.

nestedItems.name: Tubing
nestedItems.description: Lightweight, flexible tubing for laboratory, medical, and low-pressure pneumatic use. It is available in clear versions for easy visual monitoring of fluid flow.

nestedItems.name: Tube Support
nestedItems.description: Channels and clamps that prevent sagging and kinking in long runs of flexible tubing. Proper support extends the life of the tubing by reducing mechanical stress at connection points.

nestedItems.name: Tube Fittings
nestedItems.description: Push-to-connect and compression fittings for rapid, leak-free tubing assembly. These fittings allow for quick modifications to pneumatic systems without the need for specialized tools.

nestedItems.name: Tube End Caps
nestedItems.description: Protective plugs and covers to seal tube ends from contaminants during storage. They also prevent sharp tube edges from causing injury or damaging other equipment during transport.

nestedItems.name: Telephones
nestedItems.description: Enterprise-grade VOIP and analog phones for reliable business communication. They feature programmable keys and high-quality speakerphones for efficient conference calling.

nestedItems.name: Clock
nestedItems.description: High-visibility wall clocks with atomic synchronization for precise timekeeping. The large numerals ensure easy readability from across large office spaces or warehouses.

nestedItems.name: Calculator
nestedItems.description: Digital and scientific calculators for precise calculations in office and laboratory settings. These units are designed with tactile buttons and high-contrast displays for error-free data entry.

nestedItems.name: Mice
nestedItems.description: Ergonomic optical and laser mice designed for long-term comfort and precision. They feature adjustable DPI settings and programmable buttons to enhance productivity during intensive tasks.

nestedItems.name: Keyboards
nestedItems.description: Spill-resistant, full-size mechanical and membrane keyboards for office workstations. These units include tactile feedback and quiet-key technology to ensure a comfortable typing experience in shared environments.

nestedItems.name: Headphones
nestedItems.description: Noise-canceling headsets with integrated microphones for clear communication and calls. The padded ear cups provide all-day comfort while the high-fidelity drivers deliver crisp audio for virtual meetings.

nestedItems.name: Label Printers
nestedItems.description: Compact label printers for quick and efficient labeling of products and packages. They support various label sizes and styles to meet all your organizational and shipping needs.

nestedItems.name: WebCams
nestedItems.description: High-definition webcams with built-in microphones for video conferencing and remote collaboration. The auto-focus and low-light correction features ensure you always look professional on camera.

nestedItems.name: Sanding Discs
nestedItems.description: High-quality sanding discs for precision surface finishing. They are available in a range of grits to take a project from rough shaping to a mirror-like polish. These discs feature a durable backing that resists tearing during high-speed rotation.

nestedItems.name: Sanding Belts
nestedItems.description: Ergonomic sanding belts for smooth, consistent, even sanding. The heavy-duty cloth backing prevents tearing even when used on sharp metal edges. They are designed with a precision splice for bidirectional running and extended belt life.

nestedItems.name: Sanding Bits
nestedItems.description: Durable sanding tools for efficient material removal and surface preparation. These small-scale abrasives are perfect for detail work in tight spaces and intricate carvings. Available in various shapes, they allow for precise contouring on wood, metal, and plastic surfaces.

nestedItems.name: Sanding Sheets
nestedItems.description: Versatile sanding sheets for hand sanding and detail work. They can be easily folded or cut to size for use on sanding blocks or by hand. The abrasive coating is resin-bonded to ensure long-lasting performance without shedding particles.

nestedItems.name: Sanding Disc Adapters
nestedItems.description: Flexible sanding sponges for contoured surfaces and hard-to-reach areas. The foam core allows the abrasive to conform to curves without creating flat spots. They are washable and reusable, providing a cost-effective solution for manual finishing.

nestedItems.name: Grinding Wheels
nestedItems.description: High-performance grinding wheels for precision material removal and surface finishing. Engineered with premium abrasive grains, they deliver cool cutting action to minimize thermal damage to the workpiece.

nestedItems.name: Grinding Bits
nestedItems.description: Durable grinding bits for efficient material removal and surface preparation. These bits feature a hardened shank for stability and are ideal for deburring and shaping hard metals.

nestedItems.name: Grinding Cones
nestedItems.description: Versatile grinding tools for various industrial applications and surface preparation needs. Their tapered shape allows for easy access into holes and corners that standard wheels cannot reach.

nestedItems.name: burrs
nestedItems.description: Precision cutting tools for shaping, deburring, and finishing metal and other materials. Manufactured from tungsten carbide, they maintain a sharp cutting edge even under high-temperature conditions.

nestedItems.name: Grinding Wheel Adapters
nestedItems.description: Flexible grinding sponges for contoured surfaces and hard-to-reach areas. The abrasive grit is evenly distributed throughout the sponge for consistent results over its lifespan.
